titleStmt.title: SII 9.542: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 542. (A.R. No. 690 of 1919.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE BHOGESVARA TEMPLE AT CHIPPAGIRI, ALUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the cyclic year Khara, Pushya, ba. 6, Śukravāra, Sun in Makara corresponding to A.D. 1531 December 29, Friday. It states that Koṇḍabhūpa made a grant of land to the temple of Bhōgēśvara. It also registers another gift to the same god by Chikka-Timmappayya with the permission of the king, Achyutadēva-Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . karṇāṭādipa �yośvarē balavati kṣmāmaccutakṣmāpatau
satyagirirājyē sōmasukhapradhvaghē kharavatsarē puṣyēmāsyasitē ravau makaragē ṣaṣṭīdinē
bhārgevē bhaṁḍārāppayajēna koṁḍavibhunā bhōgiliṁga bhaṁḍāra Appayasarōvaraḥ
śrīkoṁḍabhūpō makarē gatē ravau śrīcippagiryā śrī Appaya bhōgīśvarāyā
nāya ca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . bhōgēśvara paścimadaluṁ . śrīda vāgi naḍedu baṁda kṣētra
ya kṣētrau dēvarige
gaḷeya bhatake U svasti śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara vīrapratāpa śrīacutadēvamahārāyarige cikkatiṁmappayanavarū
biṁnāha māḍi svāmiya nirūpadiṁdalū rāyarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi �yo tathātithipu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu dē
varige sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi dhāreyaneradu koṭa kṣētra Ādavāniya nagarada bījavari yereya hola pūrva
da mānya mughaṁḍugada A
yiguḷa kṣētravanu sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdaka koṭṭaru yī kṣē
tradoḷage dēvara Abhiṣēka gōtrada śuklayajuśākheya caṁdraka
ḷābhaṭara makaḷu kruṣṇa bhaṭṭara makkaḷu rāmabhaṭṭari
gōtrada rukuśākheye śrīvatsagōtrada śuklaya
juśākheya rāmābhaṭṭara makkaḷu tirumala Akṣā radalu voṁbhattuko
ḷagada bījavariya kṣētravanu sarvvamā(ṁ)nya kṣētradalu Uṁ
ṭāda nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa Akṣīṇi Aṣṭabhōga tējasvā(ṁ)myaṁgaḷu Ācaṁ
drārkka dēvarige puṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa yō harēti
vasuṁdharā [ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā sarvvēṣāmē
va bhūbhujāṁ na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā braṁhasvaṁ
viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti braṁhasvaṁ dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānā
crēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
Ānaṁdasaṁvatsarada cayitra śuddha 10 maṁgaḷavāradalu tirumalayya
dēvamahāarasugaḷu Utaṁgiya caṁdrabhaṭṭa bhōgīśvaradēvarige ru
drābhiṣēka sahasranāmapūje namakacamaka koṭadu bī
javari ¥ 1 Akṣāradalu vokkaḷa holanu dāreyaneradu koṭeU .
Digital edition of SII 9.542 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
